top3.sql:
SELECT MAX(cost) AS most_expensive_item
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.type = 'club event';

SELECT MAX(cost) 
FROM expense 
JOIN budget ON expense.link_to_budget = budget.budget_id 
JOIN event ON budget.link_to_event = event.event_id 
WHERE event.type = 'club';

SELECT MAX(cost) AS most_expensive_item
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.type = 'club event';

SELECT MAX(e.cost) AS most_expensive_item
FROM expense e
INNER JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
INNER JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE LOWER(ev.type) = 'club event';

SELECT cost
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.type = 'club'
ORDER BY cost DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(cost) AS most_expensive_item
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.type = 'club event';

SELECT MAX(e.cost) AS most_expensive_item
FROM expense e
INNER JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
INNER JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE LOWER(ev.type) = 'club event';

SELECT cost
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.type = 'club'
ORDER BY cost DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT MAX(cost) AS most_expensive_item
FROM expense e
JOIN budget b ON e.link_to_budget = b.budget_id
JOIN event ev ON b.link_to_event = ev.event_id
WHERE ev.type = 'club event';
